title: stelis warszewiczii
intro: Stelis warszewiczii is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique and delicate appearance. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine, where its extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis warszewiczii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its flowers or roots in hot water to create teas or decoctions, which can be used to support respiratory health and relieve symptoms associated with various conditions.
